description: CompositionGreen printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, has a round neck, buttoned chest placket, hakoba stitch detailing on the chest and split sides on the hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this green kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh with the hakoba designs, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
